text: I am in a modern, sleek building, surrounded by glass and abstract digital displays. The silence of the empty meeting space outside, contrasted with the thought-provoking, colorful exhibit in front of me, fills me with a quiet curiosity and reverence for human creativity. Here, I feel the weight of contemplation—pulled by the invitation to engage, reflect, and make meaning in this intersection of research and imagination. I am both alert and calmed, hovering between the possibilities of discovery and the serenity of reflection.
